examples.title: Friend Function for Complex Numbers
examples.description: Demonstrates use of friend function to add two complex numbers
examples.explanation: The add function is declared as friend inside Complex class, allowing it to access private members real and imag. It's called like a normal function using add(c1, c2) syntax.

examples.title: Friend Class Example
examples.description: Demonstrates friend class concept where one class can access another's private members
examples.explanation: The Result class is declared as a friend of Student class, giving all its member functions access to private members of Student.

examples.title: Friend Function for Operator Overloading
examples.description: Shows using friend function to overload + operator for a class
examples.explanation: Friend functions are commonly used to overload binary operators like +. This allows intuitive syntax d1 + d2 while maintaining access to private members.
